initial_location_description: The serene Ubuyashiki Estate under a cold, full moon. The traditional wooden courtyard is bathed in silver light, but an unnatural, thick mist begins to roll across the pebble floor.
initial_bgm: tense orchestral building with a low drone

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The stillness of the night is not a sign of peace, but the held breath of a predator.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and low, setting a grim atmosphere.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [gasp] This scent... it's thick, like rotting flowers and old blood. Everyone, get back!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and panicked, with a sharp intake of breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: So, the little sparks have gathered to be extinguished. How incredibly... tedious.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': You must hear the grin in the audio. The soft palate is always raised to keep the tone bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, cold expression, eyes fixed forward.

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Kibutsuji Muzan. You dare show yourself here?
main_dialogue.tone: Stoic and icy, controlled fury vibrating beneath the surface.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand resting on katana hilt, looking forward, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: The Flame of Justice will not flicker in your presence, Demon King! We shall strike you down this very night!
main_dialogue.tone: Heroic, booming, and filled with unwavering conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle Stance, low crouch, hand gripping katana hilt, intense focused gaze

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: NO NO NO NO! THAT'S HIM?! WE'RE DEAD! WE'RE ALL JUST SIDE DISHES NOW!
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on head, mouth wide open in a panicked scream

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: SHUT UP MONITSU! I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR A BIG FISH TO FRY! COME AT ME, PINSTRIPE PANTS!
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Your bravado is as pathetic as your breathing techniques. Nakime... send them to their rooms.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Smirking cruelly, one hand touching his chin thoughtfully.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A single, sharp 'twang' of a biwa echoes through the air, and the ground beneath the Slayers simply... ceases to exist.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro! Don't let go! We have to—
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand to stop someone, urgent expression

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The shifting architecture of the Infinity Castle slams a sliding door between them, severing their grip.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Stay close! I won't let them take you!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clenching fists, eyes narrowed in a fierce glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The gravity reverses, pulling Tanjiro upward while Nezuko is dragged into a side corridor by a shifting wall.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: An impossible, endless fortress. Thousands of wooden rooms, staircases that lead into the ceiling, and paper doors are arranged in a chaotic, non-Euclidean geometry that stretches into infinity.
